install_cmds: apt-get update && apt-get install -y git wget && apt-get clean
pip install torch-scatter torch-sparse torch-cluster torch-spline-conv -f https://data.pyg.org/whl/torch-2.5.0+cu121.html
pip install torch-geometric ogb node2vec scikit-learn numpy pandas tqdm

python -c "
import torch_geometric
from torch_geometric.datasets import Planetoid
print('Downloading Cora...')
Planetoid(root='/data/Planetoid', name='Cora')
print('Downloading CiteSeer...')
Planetoid(root='/data/Planetoid', name='CiteSeer')
print('Planetoid datasets ready.')
"

python -c "
from ogb.linkproppred import PygLinkPropPredDataset
print('Downloading ogbl-collab...')
PygLinkPropPredDataset(name='ogbl-collab', root='/data/OGB')
print('OGB dataset ready.')
"

python -c "
import os
checks = ['/data/Planetoid/Cora', '/data/Planetoid/CiteSeer', '/data/OGB/ogbl_collab']
for c in checks:
    assert os.path.exists(c), f'Missing: {c}'
print('All datasets verified.')
"
